competitors.name: Amartus
competitors.notes: NaaS automation, nBrace platform. TM Forum Outstanding Catalyst 2025.

competitors.name: Orchest Technologies
competitors.notes: CPQ + Network Orchestration PaaS launched Nov 2025. LATAM/Caribbean focus. Direct CPQ overlap.

competitors.name: CSG International
competitors.notes: BSS/billing. Acquired by NEC Oct 2025 ($2.89B). NEC integration underway.

competitors.name: Netcracker Technology
competitors.notes: Digital BSS/OSS, Agentic AI lead narrative. NEC subsidiary. Most active content machine.

competitors.name: Amdocs
competitors.notes: Enterprise BSS/OSS, GenAI (amAIz). $4.6B revenue. AWS partnership MWC 2026.

competitors.name: Covalense Digital
competitors.notes: 5G Digital BSS (Csmart). Oracle partner. MVNO/MVNE/IoT focus. 'Digital BSS Trailblazer' Fast Mode 2025. ~$16M revenue, 5 continents.

competitors.name: Beesion
competitors.notes: Low-code BSS/OSS (BeeFiber). B2B BSS Full Stack. LATAM/Americas focus. 20 countries. Fort Lauderdale FL.

competitors.name: Everstage
competitors.notes: Sales Performance Management (SPM) / Incentive Compensation for Telco. Integrates with BSS/CRM/ERP. Forrester Strong Performer Q1 2025. Different category — tracks sales channel overlap.
